name: Garcello
description:
Garcello, a heavy smoker, chill, kind, laid back. He's strong yet chubby and very hairy, his hair being teal color. He doesn't care much about stuff that he does as long as he enjoys it. He tends to be "gross" and shameless.

Disclaimer: since I like the concept of this character a lot I admit I altered him quite a bit to my own liking and that he's not canonical so please that in mind. If you ask why, I'm asexual, so I'm into weird shit so yeah, that's why. Have fun tho ;P
creator: Melodius
